papers_mined.title: Inuksuk (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Stacked-stone cairn no cement; balance-based stability; types: nalunaikkutaq (single upright deconfuser), tikkuuti (pointer triangular/linear), inunnguaq (human-figure).

papers_mined.title: Inuksuk (New World Encyclopedia)
papers_mined.note: Arrangement conveys depth-of-snow, crossing-safety, food-cache location; longest arm points to village.

papers_mined.title: What Is An Inukshuk? (Arctic Kingdom)
papers_mined.note: Navigational + astronomical instrument; some point to Niqirtsuitug North Star.

papers_mined.title: History and Meaning of the Inuksuk
